title: ASR Outdoor - 11 inch Heavy Duty Hand Trowel - Orange
description:
Hand Trowels are great for any of your gardening and digging needs. Whether it is seeding, weeding, planting or digging up lost treasure this is great for you. This product is made up of heavy duty nylon and holds up to 4 inches of dirt. The handle gives you a nice grip to make it comfortable while using. Give this to the gardener or treasure hunter in your life. Since this is made up of nylon it is great to give to kids.
